name: Zen Center of Los Angeles
description: The Zen Center of Los Angeles (ZCLA) was founded in 1967 by Taizan Maezumi Roshi, one of the most important Japanese Zen teachers to come to America. Located in the Koreatown neighborhood, ZCLA offers residential training, daily zazen, and retreats. Maezumi Roshi's students include many prominent American Zen teachers. The center practices in both the Soto and Rinzai traditions.
